headline: Does EPAM (EPAM) Leaving the S&P 500 Recast Its Governance and Competitive Positioning?
summary: In late May 2026, EPAM Systems was removed from multiple S&P 500-related indices and added to the S&P 600 Information Technology index after its shareholders approved an amendment allowing stockholders the right to call special meetings. This combination of index reclassification and governance change comes as several analysts voice caution on the IT services sector’s demand outlook amid artificial intelligence-driven shifts.
